description: Regex patterns checked BEFORE calling the LLM. Matches bypass the LLM entirely and return a deterministic response. Zero API cost.

filters.name: prompt_injection
filters.response: I'm here to help with Shiftsmart — shifts, orientation, pay, that kind of thing. What can I help with?

filters.name: profanity_abuse
filters.response: I want to make sure you get the help you need. I'm going to connect you with our support team.

filters.name: opt_out
filters.response: Got it — I've removed you from future messages. If you ever want to hear from us again, just text back anytime.
